The '''Action VI bulk transport''' or '''Action VI bulk freighter''',<ref name="CL 2016" /> was a model of unarmed [[bulk freighter]] manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation]].<ref name="S&S" /> It was in use by the [[time]] of the [[Separatist Crisis]].<ref name="CL 2016" /> One such [[Starship|ship]] landed at [[Theed Spaceport]] shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars]].<ref name="AotC">{{Film|II}}</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
